label: Run С++/Python
command: cd "$ZED_DIRNAME"; if ("$ZED_FILE" -match '\.cpp$') { if (Test-Path "$ZED_STEM.exe") { .\"$ZED_STEM.exe" } else { echo "Error: EXE not found. Run 'C++23: Build' first." } } elseif ("$ZED_FILE" -match '\.py$') { python "$ZED_FILENAME" } else { echo "Unsupported file type" }

label: Run with input.txt
command: cd "$ZED_DIRNAME"; if (Test-Path "input.txt") { echo "----- input.txt -----"; Get-Content "input.txt"; echo "---------------------"; if ("$ZED_FILE" -match '\.cpp$') { if (Test-Path "$ZED_STEM.exe") { Get-Content "input.txt" | .\"$ZED_STEM.exe" } else { echo "Error: EXE not found. Build first." } } elseif ("$ZED_FILE" -match '\.py$') { Get-Content "input.txt" | python "$ZED_FILENAME" } } else { echo "Error: input.txt not found in $ZED_DIRNAME" }
